---
schema: qual/card@1
id: PRF-LAGRANGE
kind: proof
title: Lagrange's theorem by coset partition
classification:
  areas:
  - algebra
  topics:
  - groups
relations: []
review: draft
---

::: proof
The left cosets of $H$ partition $G$ and each has $\abs H$ elements, since
$g H \to H$, $gh \mapsto h$ is a bijection. Hence $\abs G = [G:H]\abs H$.
:::
